title: Iran admits 'strategic mistake' over nuclear issue at negotiation table in Pakistan
summary_full: In a bold declaration, an MP from Iran has criticized the recent diplomatic discussions held in Pakistan, deeming them a 'tactical blunder.' He contended that engaging in dialogue about Iran's nuclear ambitions has undermined Tehran's negotiating position. The MP disclosed that the US had imposed a demand for a two-decade suspension on enriched uranium activities, which Iran firmly turned down.
